title: ASYNBO - A Simple Yet Needed Berry Overhaul
description: A berry overhaul, making sweet berry's an actual useful food source (and less annoying too)
body:
**A Simple Yet Needed Berry Overhaul** Have you ever wish that the Sweet Berry would be less annyoing and more useful in both early and late game? Then this mod is excactly what you have always dreamed of.
## Golden Berry Bushes Grow it yourself ![golden bush](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8289d159dc5819546d1d7a9316230d7626f47745.png) **Gold gold gold:** How? By pure luck. 1/1000 chance for a Sweet Berry Bush to turn into a Golden one on growth.
## Golden Berries A high-tier food source comparable to Golden Carrots.
![berry](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/937541240b8ded064bdf86b70703fa95d30be184.png) Golden berries offer excellent saturation and hunger restoration. They are the perfect late-game food source for players who prefer farming over hunting. **Recipe**
![craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2966b23feae3150d11fbf7766f3caaa9dfed0e37.png)

## The Squithe (Berry Scythe) Harvesting huge berry farms manually is slow and painful. The Squithe solves this. ![Squithe In Action](LINK_TO_BIG_SQUITHE_IMAGE_IN_HAND_OR_WORLD)
**How it works:** The Squithe allows you to harvest sweet berries in a radius around the clicked bush. That simple. **Obtaining:** You need a **Berry Core** to craft it. These cores are found as drops when harvesting normal berry bushes. **Recipe**
![squithe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae11115ce4880bb39cc51351092c6b513bfd651b.png)

## Berry Squeezer Enchantment Tired of getting pricked? It's time to *squeeze* past the thorns. ![Enchantment Showcase](LINK_TO_BIG_IMAGE_INSIDE_BUSH)
**The Effect:** When applied to boots, this enchantment allows you to walk through Sweet Berry Bushes with: * **No Damage** * **No Slowness** **How to get:** This is a treasure enchantment obtained by trading with a **Maxed Farmer Villager**. **Villager Trade**
![ench](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/54afa6695dc3d102afec12e060e0bf356b31e206.png)

## Decorative blocks Pimp up your builds or whatever you wanna do with them. ![pic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e09801a5f7e858a68187aa7edfb32752b085b07d.png)
**Recipe**
![normal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb38afa0bb6094bbd85830479b3a30f1676194d0.png) 		**Recipe**
![golden](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b85436c69fcc1f676ebf90b6ec04f447dc27372.png)
**Recipe**
![norm vine](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ceefc742f5b2549ecfa643f67de27db40fc4e486.png) 		**Recipe**
![gold vine](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69d58e0ce3475976ed7a065388b74e8862c6cce1.png)
# WIP SECTION ## Marmalade Preserve your harvest in a jar. ![Marmalade Showcase](LINK_TO_BIG_IMAGE_OF_JARS)
**Uses:** still in progress, only items exist as of right now! **Recipe**
![Marmalade Recipe](LINK_TO_SMALL_MARMALADE_RECIPE_IMAGE)
